items.source_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Rashes in Children – 49
items.evidence_text: Lists emergency and face-to-face review criteria, including confusion, stiff neck, photophobia, persistent or recurrent rash, fever, immunocompromise, and diagnostic uncertainty.
